rows.description: that were assisting to Quench ye Library fire
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly identified this as the start of a braced group with the amount consolidated on a later line (row 7 in its output). Gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the consolidated amount to this line. Gemini's note indicates careful reasoning.

rows.description: more for the Same work to Clerk of St Ebbs, 1s 4d For mending St Miles Engine 7s to Mr Bakers
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's description is more complete and accurately captures the embedded monetary values as context. Its amount '0 18 6' is correct and clearly associated with this braced group in the image. Gpt-5-mini misread the amount as '1 1 0'.

rows.description: men 9. 1s 5d Smith 3s
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly identified this as the end of a braced group, with the amount consolidated on row 7. Its description is also accurate. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned an amount and misread the description, mistaking it for a continuation of the previous line.
rows.english_description: Payments to various labourers (listed as 'men') and to Smith; specific structured amounts not recorded here.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments to various labourers and to Smith; no structured amount recorded.

rows.description: Laid out of Coll. mony arising upon the last years Acct of Nov. 2. 1709. upon Armagh Buildings. vide ye Building £184 15s 2d Acct. p.66

rows.english_description_with_amount: College money expended on the Armagh buildings as noted in the prior account, amounting to £0 3s 6d.

rows.description: For two Labourers for carrying dung from ye pump to ye Old Boghouse by Jo. ye Butler
rows.notes: Visual verification shows this is an entry with amount '0 1 4'. Gemini-flash extracted '0 1 6'. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the braced amount '184 15 2' to this line and mis-indexed. Gemini-flash's description is accurate.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for two labourers for carrying dung from the pump to the Old Boghouse (by Jo. the Butler), amounting to £0 1s 4d.

rows.notes: This row was added by visual inspection. It represents the consolidated amount '184 15 2' clearly visible next to the brace spanning the descriptions for rows 15 and 16. Gemini-flash misidentified this amount as part of the description context, while gpt-5-mini attributed it to the wrong description line and mis-indexed.
rows.english_description: Unspecified entry — likely amount allocated to the Armagh building account; no description provided on this line.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amount recorded (no description), amounting to £184 15s 2d.
